title: Afghanistan:  Fulcrum for a New Paradigm
description:
This video compilation is from the recent November 13-14, 2021 Schiller Institute Conference. The entire proceedings can be seen here: 
https://schillerinstitute.com/blog/2021/11/11/conference-all-moral-resources-of-humanity-have-to-be-called-up-mankind-must-be-the-immortal-species/

Speakers include:
Helga Zepp-LaRouche, Ambassador Anna Evstigeeva, Pino Arlacchi, and Dr. Shah Mehrabi
